subcodes.title: Address at New York Peace Society reception, spoken on 1912-05-13
subcodes.first_line: Although I felt indisposed this afternoon, yet because I attach great importance to this assembly
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @universal peace; world unity, @unity in diversity, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @suffering and imprisonment, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
